title: oncostemum fuscopilosum
intro: Oncostemum fuscopilosum, also known as the hairy-leaved oncostemum or hairy-leaved oncoba, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ochnaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating wounds, due to its antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. Oncostemum fuscopilosum is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves can be used to make herbal teas or infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
